basics.name: Mario Rico Ibáñez
basics.label: MSc Computer Science @ EPFL | Machine Learning Engineer
basics.summary: Computer Science MSc student at EPFL (GPA: 5.44/6) with a BSc in Telecommunications Engineering from UPV (GPA: 9/10, Top 3/200+). Machine Learning Engineer at Xcert AI. Research interests in adversarial robustness, deep reinforcement learning for telecommunications, and large language models.

work.name: Xcert AI
work.summary: Building hybrid semantic search and graph-based RAG for aerospace compliance.
highlights: Raised LLM QA accuracy from 35% to 95% by building hybrid semantic search and graph-based RAG over aerospace compliance data
Cut PDF processing latency by 10x via LLM title normalization with fuzzy OCR alignment, reducing dependence on large vision models
Delivered 90%+ duplicate-detection precision using HDBSCAN + vector embeddings + LLM validation on a large-scale document store

work.name: Instituto de Telecomunicaciones y Aplicaciones Multimedia
work.summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning for UAV base-station positioning optimization.
highlights: Improved UAV base-station positioning by 71-97% over baselines across 6 scenarios by applying PPO with continuous actions and signal-based states
Scaled training to 12,000+ episodes with a GPU-accelerated 5G/6G simulator (massive MIMO); retained 91% performance under high AoA noise (STD=100°)

work.name: Computer Vision & Behaviour Analysis Lab
work.summary: Multilabel Emotion Recognition using Large Language Models.
highlights: Achieved 78.3% multilabel emotion accuracy (vs BERT 70.1%, RoBERTa 74.3%, XLNet 72.9%) by fine-tuning Llama-2 7B with QLoRA
Expanded dataset from 7,666 to 10,700 (+40%) via augmentation + GPT-based QA; used LoRA r=16 to fit consumer GPUs while maintaining accuracy

publications.name: Optimizing Aerial Base Station Positioning Using Deep Reinforcement Learning in UAV Networks
publications.summary: Applying PPO with continuous actions for UAV base-station positioning optimization in mobile networks.
publications.authors: Rico Ibáñez, Mario; Akhtarshenas, Azim; López-Pérez, David; Geraci, Giovanni

projects.name: Adversarial Attacks on Image-to-Image Models
projects.summary: Reduced CLIP similarity 0.88 to 0.74 (16%) under APGD attacks across 3 diffusion models. Evaluated 10k+ generated images; analyzed RobustCLIP & dataset filtering trade-offs. Supervised by Prof. Volkan Cevher.

projects.name: Chatsplaining: Intelligent STEM Tutoring
projects.summary: Improved STEM QA accuracy 0.25 to 0.40 via 3-stage curriculum, SFT + RAG + quantization; indexed 39k chunks in FAISS. Applied DPO to boost reasoning (0.841) rivaling larger models.

projects.name: Evolution Strategies for Deep RL Pretraining
projects.summary: Explored Evolution Strategies as pretraining for DQN/PPO across Flappy Bird, Breakout, and MuJoCo. Swiss Data Science Center collaboration.
